name.zh: 从交易收入到经常性收入

summary.en: A shift pattern where revenue moves from one-off transactions toward subscriptions, usage cycles, replenishment, or recurring relationships that make demand more predictable.
summary.zh: 一种迁移模式：收入从一次性交易转向订阅、使用周期、补货机制或持续关系，让需求和现金流更可预测。

sources.label: Osterwalder et al. · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020 · Shift Pattern Library

references.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley
references.pages: Shift Pattern Library: From Transactional to Recurring Revenue

note.en: Frames recurring revenue as a business-model shift with BMC consequences, not just a pricing tactic.
note.zh: 把经常性收入视为会改变 BMC 的商业模式迁移，而不只是定价技巧。
